clause.title: Determination of peak efficiency and fan power ratio

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The efficiency of a selected fan is the product of its impeller efficiency (including any casing), motor efficiency and the integrated motor control equipment multiplier in (2).

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The value of the integrated motor control equipment multiplier—

ol.li: where the fan motor is not capable of variable speed operation or has an external variable speed control device, is 1; or

where the fan motor has integrated variable speed control capability and the motor input power at peak efficiency point is less than 5 kW, −0.03×In(P)+1.088 MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahSart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeyOeI0IaaG imaiaac6cacaaIWaGaaG4maiabgEna0kaadMeacaWGUbGaaiikaiaa dcfacaGGPaGaey4kaSIaaGymaiaac6cacaaIWaGaaGioaiaaiIdaaa a@445E@ R0lGODlhiQAVAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAiQAVAAAC44SPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+w9eQeCMyWhW6EMe 6NqKZWy8iE219F27vMpS0Ei7yIqh8ymHE+bp9wQ2igAnVSlE/qxQiLNb/PayJfKyvLhyz1hvdwyP w9U1XdJcfevl7dh9fKXVFjeUwhPol/d3gzO4l5cGFkb1giNGGBmVWQeI51nZCImXKAoZuFmK+ZmK lUL6yOcYW7pY26R3qcoq+hqGhvq41ik7NbvYpznnc3y6a1zMuwWLdGlYdSRh4/cVOk1puGN9bd0d Yg78e66+rtE8yw4fn44uX29/j5+vv8/f7/8PsF4BACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx/wUBAAcLRFNNVDcA ARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJp ZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0 EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEB AQADAAEABAAACgEAAgSGEiItAgCIMAACAIIuAAIAiDAAAgCIMwACBIbXALQCAINJAAIAg24AAgCC KAACAINQAAIAgikAAgSGKx0AKwIAiDEAAgCCLgACAIgwAAIAiDgAAgCIOAAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlw ZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1h dGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHht bG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bW8+JiN4MjIx Mjs8L21vPjxtbj4wLjAzPC9tbj48bW8+JiN4MDBENzs8L21vPjxtaT5JPC9taT48bWk+bjwvbWk+ PG1vIHN0cmV0Y2h5PSdmYWxzZSc+KDwvbW8+PG1pPlBgPC9taT48bW8gc3RyZXRjaHk9J2ZhbHNl Jz4pPC9tbz48bW8+KzwvbW8+PG1uPjEuMDg4PC9tbj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5 cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgYAAAAAAAA7, where—
P MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahSart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuaaaa@36D0@ R0lGODlhEAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAARAAACHYSPqcvdAaMDAdVncWbX9BVBzjeR43SYnIS2 7msUACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcLRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRp bWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0Qv QVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0 EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUAAAAAAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1 QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRo IHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+UDwvbWk+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgIAAAAAAAA7 = the motor input power of the fan (kW) at peak efficiency point; and
In MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahSart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamysaiaad6 gaaaa@37BC@ R0lGODlhEgASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEgASAAACI4SPqcvtD4OEKNBjr8lT5vVZIhMCHImd6Iat ZvulXarV9u0UACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxzgUBAAcLRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdl cwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAI IS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A 9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDSQACAINu AAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz2Dw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJh bnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJk KUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxt cm93PjxtaT5JPC9taT48bWk+bjwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1 QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw== = natural logarithm; or
where the fan motor has integrated variable speed control capability and the motor input power at peak efficiency point is greater than or equal to 5 KW, is 1.04.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The fan power ratio of an individual fan must be calculated in accordance with the following formula:

ol.li: FPRindividualfanMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOraiaadc facaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaadMgacaWGUbGaamizaiaadMgacaWG2bGa amyAaiaadsgacaWG1bGaamyyaiaadYgacaWGMbGaamyyaiaad6gaae qaaaaa@44B9@ R0lGODlhVAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAVAAZAAACpISPqcvtD6OctNqLs968+w9iwUgGRzmeZcga 5om8Ljy3oAzgOp3bn4zrxWpE3waY2BGDxgwquVKlmhzkcPFiUi9WXtK75Ta0wjI5N72iHdM05EwO ntXjh+kuicZI0PQqBcQH2JYlJIj2h9eU1dZTiKcY6TgT6WbzaGjIWANJ6VI4aYQ5GUjqaQqYOeeR OhjFmOh6iHK3GqaheKtrqdvr+wscvFAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx/wUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDRgACAINQAAIAg1IAAwAbAAALAQACAINpAAIAg24AAgCDZAACAINpAAIAg3YAAgCD aQACAINkAAIAgyF1AAIAg2EAAgCDbAACAINmAAIAg2EAAgCDbgAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRo TUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxu cz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPkY8L21pPjxt aT5QPC9taT48bXN1Yj48bWk+UjwvbWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPmk8L21pPjxtaT5uPC9taT48bWk+ZDwv bWk+PG1pPmk8L21pPjxtaT52PC9taT48bWk+aTwvf21pPjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+dTwvbWk+PG1p PmE8L21pPjxtaT5sPC9taT48bWk+ZjwvbWk+PG1pPmE8L21pPjxtaT5uPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9t c3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDIGCQAAAAAAADs= = the fan power ratio of the fan; and

ηrfMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeq4TdG2aaS baaSqaaiaadkhacaWGMbaabeaaaaa@39B1@ R0lGODlhFQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAZAAACMoSPqcvtD6OctNoQAM4xb01x4CSKUBkeJoIp qDuqstFua2K28bK+TD6T+Eg74c2CTC4KACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx4AUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgSEtwNoAwAbAAALAQACAINyAAIAg2YAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz/zw/eG1s IHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xp cGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6 Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT4mI3gwM0I3Ozwv bWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPnI8L21pPjxtaT5mPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9tc3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+ PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QAQgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the efficiency calculated using the equation at J6D5(2) or J6D5(3) as applicable, with electrical input power PdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38D6@ R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACMoSPqcvtD6N8odppAtKT5554kCiOVklhobot Vcqg2zW/cgxo9Pjpku/7nV6sm4mFTGIKACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDUAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8PD94bWwg dmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlw Ym9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDov L3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxtcm93 PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0 aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7, as determined at (5); and

ηdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeq4TdG2aaS baaSqaaiaadsgacaWGWbaabeaaaaa@39AD@ R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACNoSPqcvtD6OctFoWAshaar5VXUiNY2SKx7mx Sfo28Pp9MmK3rnF2PqnokXIQTm1XvLSUzGajAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMeAFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAET V2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVy IE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAP Q19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEA AwABAAQAAAoBAAIEhLcDaAMAGwAACwEAAgCDZAACAINwAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88 P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIg KENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdo dHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+JiN4MDNC Nzs8L21pPjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAEIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the static efficiency of the selected fan at the duty point for installation type A or C, or the total efficiency at the duty point for installation type B or D.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The average fan power ratio of multiple fans must be calculated in accordance with the following formula:

ol.li: FPRaverageMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOraiaadc facaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaadggacaWG2bGaamyzaiaadkhacaWGHbGa am4zaiaadwgaaeqaaaaa@3F19@ R0lGODlhQAAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAQAAZAAACf4SPqcvtD6OctNqLs968gwCGwSGCpOhNI4ms hgunkfu19svKTnznNK1T8HK4Yi3YKCWUJxOSMTQupc8pFUjEVo8LLdeLBHuBYBlqGUI7PytlOz1K s03rarx2j7ePee5zT+e0x8e0dcf2xcJTZsYE1xR4tpUxOLkhZ5mpucnJUAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDH/BQEABwhEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABED U3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQV D0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8M AQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINGAAIAg1AAAgCDUgADABsAAAsBAAIAg2EAAgCD dgACAINlAAIAg3IAAgCDYQACAINnAAIAg2UAAAEBAwAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2 ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBi b2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8v d3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bWk+RjwvbWk+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxt c3ViPjxtaT5SPC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+YTwvbWk+PG1pPnY8L21pPjxtaT5lPC9taT48bWk+cjwv bWk+PG1pPmE8L21pPjxtaT5nPC9DbWk+PG1pPmU8L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93Pjwv bWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the average fan power ratio of multiple fans; and

PdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38D7@ R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACMoSPqcvtD6N8odppAtKT5554kCiOVklhobot Vcqg2zW/cgxo9Pjpku/7nV6sm4mFTGIKACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDUAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8PD94bWwg dmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlw Ym9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDov L3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxtcm93 PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0 aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the electrical input power of each selected fan at duty point, calculated in accordance with (5); and

PrfMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaciiuamaaBa aaleaacaGGYbGaaeOzaaqabaaaaa@38D9@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLoSPqcvtD6M0odpJT8Bbz55JIDA+YGleHIag rUs2sFVRdC16n56H0aViCYfESAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHfBQEABwhEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACAoJQAAMAGwAACwEAAgCCcgACAIFmAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJz aW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2Fy ZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3 LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWkgbWF0aHZhcmlhbnQ9Im5v cm1hbCI+UDwvbWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPnI8L21pPjxtdGV4dD5mPC9tdGV4dD48L21yb3c+PC9tc3Vi PjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEYLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAy BggAAAAAAAA7 = the electrical input power of each reference fan at duty point, calculated in accordance with (6).

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: P dp MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiuamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38D6@ R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACMoSPqcvtD6N8odppAtKT5554kCiOVklhobot Vcqg2zW/cgxo9Pjpku/7nV6sm4mFTGIKACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDUAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8PD94bWwg dmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlw Ym9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDov L3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxtcm93 PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0 aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 must be calculated in accordance with the following:

ol.li: pdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiCamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38F7@ R0lGODlhGQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAGQAZAAACOISPqcvtD6OctNqLb9iAYx9ooTFWZacdZ7cu ZYs+m4dwNgOj4+zi5N/iKUK72GRGpKUyLKbzGSkAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcIRFNNVDcA ARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJp ZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0 EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEB AQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDcAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8 PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwy IChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0n aHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPnA8L21p Pjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwh LS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the static pressure (Pa) at the duty point for installation type A or C or the total pressure (Pa) at the duty point for installation type B or D; and

QdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyuamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38D8@ R0lGODlhGQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAGQAZAAACPoSPqcvtD6OcMNhAET6bdu4tXyVOIyidgNqo LHOOljMbdfLal7izLwa84W6zDXBV0nWOx8zlmcFFh9Oq9VoAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcI RFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAAR BUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0 j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgIC AgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUQADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5 cGUwMDP8PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBN YXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4 bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1p PlE8L21pPjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the flow (m3/s) at the duty point; and

ηdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeq4TdG2aaS baaSqaaiaadsgacaWGWbaabeaaaaa@39AE@ R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACNoSPqcvtD6OctFoWAshaar5VXUiNY2SKx7mx Sfo28Pp9MmK3rnF2PqnokXIQTm1XvLSUzGajAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMeAFAQAHCERTTVQ3AAET V2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVy IE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAP Q19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEA AwABAAQAAAoBAAIEhLcDaAMAGwAACwEAAgCDZAACAINwAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88 P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIg KENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdo dHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWk+JiN4MDNC Nzs8L21pPjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAEIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the static efficiency at the duty point for installation type A or C or the total efficiency at the duty point for installation type B or D.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: PrfMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaciiuamaaBa aaleaacaGGYbGaaeOzaaqabaaaaa@38D9@ R0lGODlhFQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAYAAACLoSPqcvtD6M0odpJT8Bbz55JIDA+YGleHIag rUs2sFVRdC16n56H0aViCYfESAEAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHfBQEABwhEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJh c2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRN VCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0 Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAK AQACAoJQAAMAGwAACwEAAgCCcgACAIFmAAABAQAAAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJz aW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2Fy ZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3 LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48bXN1Yj48bWkgbWF0aHZhcmlhbnQ9Im5v cm1hbCI+UDwvbWk+PG1yb3c+PG1pPnI8L21pPjxtdGV4dD5mPC9tdGV4dD48L21yb3c+PC9tc3Vi PjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEYLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAy BggAAAAAAAA7 must be calculated in accordance with the following formula:

ol.li: pdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiCamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38F7@ R0lGODlhGQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAGQAZAAACOISPqcvtD6OctNqLb9iAYx9ooTFWZacdZ7cu ZYs+m4dwNgOj4+zi5N/iKUK72GRGpKUyLKbzGSkAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcIRFNNVDcA ARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJp ZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0 EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEB AQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDcAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8 PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwy IChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0n aHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPnA8L21p Pjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwh LS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the static pressure (Pa) at the duty point for installation type A or C or total pressure (Pa) at the duty point for installation type B or D; and

QdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyuamaaBa aaleaacaWGKbGaamiCaaqabaaaaa@38D8@ R0lGODlhGQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAGQAZAAACPoSPqcvtD6OcMNhAET6bdu4tXyVOIyidgNqo LHOOljMbdfLal7izLwa84W6zDXBV0nWOx8zlmcFFh9Oq9VoAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcI RFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAAR BUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0 j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgIC AgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUQADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5 cGUwMDP8PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBN YXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4 bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1p PlE8L21pPjxtcm93PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9t YXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the flow (m3/s) at the duty point; and

ηrfMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA IHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xp cGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6 PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QAQgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7 = the efficiency calculated using the equation at J6D5(2) or (3) as applicable with electrical input power PdpMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 R0lGODlhFgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFgAZAAACMoSPqcvtD6N8odppAtKT5554kCiOVklhobot Vcqg2zW/cgxo9Pjpku/7nV6sm4mFTGIKACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx3wUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDUAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2QAAgCDcAAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP8PD94bWwg dmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlw Ym9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDov L3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxtcm93 PjxtaT5kPC9taT48bWk+cDwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1Yj48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0 aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgkAAAAAAAA7.

callout.p: Duty point refers to the operating point of the fan when providing the maximum system design flow at the system design pressure. Where the fan is a fixed speed fan, the full speed efficiency and the pressure where the fan curve intersects the system curve may be used.
